name: button
description: Interactive button element supporting multiple colors, sizes, and visual styles.

color.description: Color variant (omit for default body coloring).

url.description: When tag is 'a', becomes the href attribute.

label.description: Visible button text (used as default slot fallback).

iconLeft.description: Whether an icon should be rendered before the label (Phase 0 renders a placeholder span).

iconRight.description: Whether an icon should be rendered after the label (Phase 0 renders a placeholder span).

aria_label.description: Override the accessible name (required for icon-only buttons).

slots.iconLeft: Icon to render before the label
slots.iconRight: Icon to render after the label

a11y: Disabled state announced via aria-disabled on non-button tags
Color is not the only signal for state — text label is always present
aiHint: Use tag='a' when the button navigates (becomes href), tag='button' for in-page actions. Prefer label+icon over icon-only for clarity.
